transcript.text:
This tteokboki (spicy rice cake) stand has been here for 48 years!
[Korean Soul Food: Tteokboki]
[The one spot that has survived for this long in this food court]
[Passed down for 2 generations]
[That's why I'm here!]
5 servings of tteokboki,
[Additional orders]
[All here]
[What the...]
She can't eat it all
Would be amazing if she does
[I will show you today]
[Something amazing]
That's amazing
Really impressive
Hello everyone

I'm at Suyu Central Market today
[Suyu Central Market] [Gangbuk-gu, Suyu-dong]
This tteokboki stand has been here for 48 years!
You know those very chewy market rice cakes?
I've been craving those so I'm here
The one made with rice
But I use flour rice cake for my restaurant
What's cool is that it's inside the market
It's a little old-looking food court
[Ta-da]
Pass the market here
There it is! The food court
But everything seems closed
[Every one of them out of business except 1 spot]
[Found it!]
Hello~!

These places all closed down?
[Not much left here]
[But this tteokboki spot is still here]
Here's the menu Everything sounds good
Is it your first time here?
I've passed by here before
But first time dining in
Tteokboki!
[Chewy rice cake made with rice!]
[With its best pairing foods]
5 servings of tteokboki,
Do you have more people coming?
No, it's just for me
Soondae (pork blood sausage),
Kimbap, 2 fishcake skewers,
2 mandu (fried dumplings)

And boiled egg
[Hand-rolled kimbap]
[Finished right away]
[Cut the soondae up in perfect bite sizes]
[With today's main menu: tteokboki]
[That looks so good...]
[Setting up the meal herself]
Don't leave leftovers!
[Don't you worry!]
How're you going to eat it all?
A simple lunch meal
The way these look Very red and...
The rice cake looks really chewy
This is really simple Did I order too little?
She can't do it
Would be amazing if she does

You're right
If 1 person eats all of that
It's been a while
Type of tteokboki I had as a child
Tteokboki near schools and markets
Very strong gochujang (chili pepper paste) flavor
And it's very chewy
Consistency is very important
It has to be good if the rice cake is good
Fishcake
It's nice and soaked
Some kimbap too From the middle
I asked for no cucumbers No greens found here
Dip it in some sauce
How do you like it?
It's sweet and delicious

Eat slowly
This is my daughter in law
[Daughter-in-law]
Your age...?
81!
Really? You don't look 81!
Very healthy
No, I'm old
No way, not at all
I wrote that over there
I did 40 years
She did 8
48 years...
That's about double my age
Running this place for even 10 years is impressive, Really difficult to do 40 plus years
Respect!

It's different from today's tteokboki sauce
It's sweet with strong gochujang flavor Old-style tteokboki
Excuse me, I ordered boiled eggs as well
Eggs!
Let's put it here
It's pretty addicting
I haven't had soondae yet
Just blood sausage and liver
Pork liver with some salt
[Crispy mandu with some tteokboki sauce!]
It's been sitting here, but still very crispy
It's like...
When you eat fresh and tasty fried chicken,
and you eat the leftover the next day but still tastes good
Just like that
1 down

The rice cake is really good
It's starting to get a little spicy
[This young lady really knows how to eat!]
It's a weird feeling to eat in an empty food court
It's a good amount of portion for 1 serving
Just how many is it?
Over 30 pieces That's a lot
You eat really well
Can you see it?
It's tasty
Such a good eater
Thank you
[Don't you leave leftovers]
Huh?
I will smack you if you leave leftovers
[That isn't happening]

There are some to-go orders here and there
I see a lot of regulars
This one customer came here since the 1st grade and now they're 60
A lot of people are touched by the fact that this grandmother stood her ground in this food court for so long, that's why they show more support
Came here hoping to see her again and she's still here
[Here for 48 years]
[In this very location]
[The same flavors from then]
I had a lot of fishcake skewers this winter
At least once a week
The soup is the best
It's a must when you eat this
Come to think of it, there are no fishcake in the tteokboki
Not even veggies
4 pieces! 3 plates down
[Is that all for herself...?]

[It's 1 serving if I eat alone]
It's really cold here, so the food got cold
So I packed them for to-go and ordered new ones
I'll reheat those for later at home
Boiled eggs
Looks good
Cut!
[With lots of sauce]
The sauce is better fresh
This is it
It's even chewier
1 kimbap
Dip it
[What are you?!]
Can you eat all 5 plates?
Without a problem

[Just act like you didn't hear that]
The rice cakes are thin and chewy 3 pieces per bite
[She only has 1 plate left...]
There are people that like the sausage vs the intestines
I like the intestines
I ask for extra intestines with no cartilages
I don't like cartilages
I'm a huge fan of tteokboki snack foods
I want to visit all the other famous spots
I've been to Apple House,
Miso's House,
I want to try those 3-generation, 5-generation locations
Please leave me a comment if you know a famous restaurant
Tteokboki!
[4 pieces at a time]
I'm neutralizing the spiciness with the hot fishcake soup

You're really eating it all
We give big portions too
Right, it's a lot
[And you don't seem bugged at all]
With some sauce
[I will have what she's having]
Soondae skewer
I'll eat this in 1 bite
Drinking the fishcake soup after eating the egg,
breaks up the yolk right away
Lungs
Last one!
-You finished it because you liked it? -Of course!
First time ever seeing anything like this
[She made a record once again]
Amazing

You're even more amazing
Your cooking skills are amazing
Just thankful that you enjoyed my food
No, thank you!
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
